meaning: vt.打过头,飞过目标vi.射击越标,行动过火
examples: The department may overshoot its cash limit this year.
Self-deprecating humor is usually the safest type, but here again you don't want to overshoot the target.
One recent study attempted to calculate the extent of this "ecological overshoot of the human economy".
Eventually (already?) the number of features will overshoot the needs of the middle of the market.
Mr King said that the overshoot would be temporary, partly because it reflected the VAT increase.
